_meta.description: Paths that require explicit operator approval before any AI agent, script, or automated process may delete, overwrite, or restructure them.
_meta.hard_rule: Protect the content. Protect the intent. Protect the architecture.

protected.reason: CALI memory vault — irreplaceable reasoning history
Core CALI system state, memory, notes, hearing SKG
Epistemic Gravity Field and other cognitive modules
Shared substrate mesh across all ORB shells
Alignment layer — must never be silently replaced
Canonical primitive cache — changes affect all ORB shells
Default launch profile — drives all environment resolution
